metadata.description: Feinschliff marketplace — brand-pluggable design system and adjacent content-creation plugins.

plugins.name: feinschliff
plugins.description: Brand-pluggable design system — turn DESIGN.md or HTML into brand-perfect PowerPoint decks. Core deck/diagram generator. Ships with the feinschliff, blank, and claude brand packs.

plugins.name: feinschliff-builder
plugins.description: Brand-pack authoring toolkit (compile-html, decompile, verify, improve-brand). Requires feinschliff.

plugins.name: feinschliff-extra
plugins.description: Extra brand packs for feinschliff: 10 additional themes including catppuccin, nord, gruvbox, solarized, and more.
